revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Uses TemplateStyles|Template:Infobox hieroglyphs/style.css}} == Usage == To display the infobox in articles, please copy the following source text into the start of the article: {{Infobox hieroglyphs |name = |name transcription = |name explanation = }} == List of parameters == {| class="wikitable" !Variable !width="130" | Type !Explanation |- | '''position''' | optional | Position of the hieroglyph infobox, default is "right" |- | '''width''' | optional | Width of the hieroglyph infobox, default is "300" |- | '''title''' | optional | Name in of the header of the infobox, if not entered the article name + "in [[Egyptian hieroglyphs|hieroglyphs]]" will be displayed. |- | '''expanded title''' | optional | Replaces the text „in [[Egyptian hieroglyphs|hieroglyphs]]" by the entered text. |- | '''name''' | optional, but must be entered for all parameters, which begin with "name" | Name of the subject in hieroglyphs |- | '''name in cartouche''' | optional | Switches on the display of cartouche, the parameters must be entered in a preferred sequence, e.g. "yes" |- | '''name cartouche symbol''' | optional | Places the entered hieroglyphs before the cartouche, if not cartouche will be displayed |- | '''name in Serekh''' | optional | Switches on the display of Serekh, the parameters must be entered in a preferred sequence, e.g. "yes" |- | '''name Serekh symbol''' | optional | Places the entered hieroglyph symbol before the Serekh, if not the Serekh will be displayed |- | '''name determinative''' | optional | Places the entered hieroglyphs after the cartouche or the Serekh. |- | '''name transcription''' | optional | Transcription of the hieroglyph name of the subject |- | '''name explanation''' | optional | Explanation of the name of the subject, also translation and/or English name, as well as possibly the place of discovery of the name |- | '''name unicode''' | optional | Unicode encoding of the hieroglyphs |- | '''name2''' to '''name10''' | optional, but must be entered for all parameters, which begin with name2 to name10 | Other names of the subject in hieroglyphs |- | '''name2 in cartouche''' to '''name10 in cartouche''' | optional | Switches on the display of cartouche for the corresponding other name, the parameters must be entered in a preferred sequence, e. g. „yes" |- | '''name2 cartouche symbol''' to '''name10 cartouche symbol''' | optional | Places the entered hieroglyphs before the cartouche, if not the cartouche will be displayed |- | '''name2 in Serekh''' to '''name10 in Serekh''' | optional | Switches on the display of Serekh for the corresponding other name, the parameters must be entered in a preferred sequence, e.g. „yes" |- | '''name2 Serekh symbol''' to '''name10 Serekh symbol''' | optional | Places the entered hieroglyph symbol before the corresponding name in Serekh, if not the Serekh will be displayed |- | '''name2 determinative''' to '''name10 determinative''' | optional | Places the entered hieroglyphs after the cartouche or the Serekh. |- | '''name2 transcription''' to '''name10 transcription''' | optional | Transcription of the corresponding other hieroglyph names of the subject |- | '''name2 explanation''' to '''name10 explanation''' | optional | Explanation of the corresponding other name of the subject, also translation and/or English name, as well as possibly of the place of discovery of the name |- | '''name2 unicode''' to '''name10 unicode''' | optional | Unicode encoding of the hieroglyphs |- | '''Greek''' | optional | The corresponding Greek form |- | '''Greek expanded''' | optional | additional text entries of the left side of the "Greek" line |- | '''Coptic''' | optional | The corresponding Coptic form |- | '''Coptic- Sahidic''' | optional | The corresponding Sahidic form |- | '''Coptic- Bohairic''' | optional | The corresponding Bohairic form |- | '''Coptic-Ancient Coptic ''' | optional | The corresponding Ancient Coptic form |- | '''cuneiform''' | optional | The corresponding cuneiform form |- | '''Remarks''' | optional | For general remarks about the hieroglyphs |- | '''image1''' to '''image5''' | | optional images under the infobox |- | '''image1 width''' to '''image5 width''' | | Entry of the width of the images from '''image1''' to '''image5''', defaults are 200px |- | '''image1 description''' to '''image5 description''' | | Entry of an image description |} == Example == {{infobox hieroglyphs |title = … foo |name = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name2 = < Aa1-G43-I9-G43 > |name2 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name2 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name3 = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name3 in cartouche = yes |name3 cartouche symbol = G43 |name3 determinative = wr-O24 |name3 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name3 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name4 = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name4 in Serekh = yes |name4 Serekh symbol = G43 |name4 determinative = wr-O24 |name4 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name4 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |remarks = Remarks |image1 = |image2 = |image2 width = 100px |image3 = |image3 description = test }} {{infobox hieroglyphs |title = … mal |name = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name2 = < Aa1-G43-I9-G43 > |name2 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name2 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name3 = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name3 in cartouche = yes |name3 cartouche symbol = G43 |name3 determinative = wr-O24 |name3 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name3 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name4 = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name4 in Serekh = yes |name4 Serekh symbol = G43 |name4 determinative = wr-O24 |name4 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name4 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |remarks = Remarks |image1 = |image2 = |image2 width = 100px |image3 = |image3 description = test }} {{clear}} == Hieroglyphic Combinations == Hieroglyphic combinations are divided into sets of a letter and a number in [[unicode]]. Each hieroglyphic is provided with a letter and number set listed on the [https://www.unicode.org/charts/PDF/U13000.pdf Hieroglyphics Chart]. Example: A001 would be written in the Hieroglyphs Infobox as A1. ==Template data== {{Template data header}} {{cot|title=Parameters (200+)|bg=#ccc}} { "params": { "width": {}, "BREITE": {}, "position": {}, "AUSRICHTUNG": {}, "title": {}, "TITEL": {}, "expanded title": {}, "TITEL-ERWEITERT": {}, "name": {}, "name in cartouche": {}, "NAME-IN-KARTUSCHE": {}, "name cartouche symbol": {}, "NAME-KARTUSCHE-SYMBOL": {}, "name determinative": {}, "NAME-DETERMINATIV": {}, "name transcription": {}, "NAME-TRANSKRIPTION": {}, "name explanation": {}, "NAME-ERKLÄRUNG": {}, "name in Serekh": {}, "NAME-IN-SERECH": {}, "name Serekh symbol": {}, "NAME-SERECH-SYMBOL": {}, "name unicode": {}, "name2": {}, "name2 in cartouche": {}, "NAME2-IN-KARTUSCHE": {}, "name2 cartouche symbol": {}, "NAME2-KARTUSCHE-SYMBOL": {}, "name2 determinative": {}, "NAME2-DETERMINATIV": {}, "name2 transcription": {}, "NAME2-TRANSKRIPTION": {}, "name2 explanation": {}, "NAME2-ERKLÄRUNG": {}, "name2 in Serekh": {}, "NAME2-IN-SERECH": {}, "name2 Serekh symbol": {}, "name2 unicode": {}, "name3": {}, "name3 in cartouche": {}, "NAME3-IN-KARTUSCHE": {}, "name3 cartouche symbol": {}, Serekh": {}, "NAME4-IN-SERECH": {}, "name4 Serekh symbol": {}, "name4 unicode": {}, "name5": {}, "name5 in cartouche": {}, "NAME5-IN-KARTUSCHE": {}, "name5 cartouche symbol": {}, hieroglyphs|hieroglyphs]]" by the entered text. |- | '''name''' | optional, but must be entered for all parameters, which begin with "name" | Name of the subject in hieroglyphs |- | '''name in cartouche''' | optional | Switches on the display of cartouche, the parameters must be entered in a preferred sequence, e.g. "yes" |- | '''name cartouche symbol''' | optional | Places the entered hieroglyphs before the cartouche, if not cartouche will be displayed |- | '''name in Serekh''' | optional | Switches on the display of Serekh, the parameters must be entered in a preferred sequence, e.g. "yes" |- | '''name Serekh symbol''' | optional | Places the entered hieroglyph symbol before the Serekh, if not the Serekh will be displayed |- | '''name determinative''' | optional | Places the entered hieroglyphs after the cartouche or the Serekh. |- | '''name transcription''' | optional | Transcription of the hieroglyph name of the subject |- | '''name explanation''' | optional | Explanation of the name of the subject, also translation and/or English name, as well as possibly the place of discovery of the name |- | '''name unicode''' | optional | Unicode encoding of the hieroglyphs |- | '''name2''' to '''name10''' | optional, but must be entered for all parameters, which begin with name2 to name10 | Other names of the subject in hieroglyphs |- | '''name2 in cartouche''' to '''name10 in cartouche''' | optional | Switches on the display of cartouche for the corresponding other name, the parameters must be entered in a preferred sequence, e. g. „yes" |- | '''name10 in Serekh''' | optional | Switches on the display of Serekh for the corresponding other name, the parameters must be entered in a preferred sequence, e.g. „yes" |- | '''name2 Serekh '''name10 determinative''' | optional | Places the entered hieroglyphs after the cartouche or the Serekh. |- | '''name2 transcription''' to '''name10 transcription''' | optional | Transcription of the corresponding other hieroglyph names of the subject |- | '''name2 explanation''' to '''name10 explanation''' | optional | Explanation of the corresponding other name of the subject, also translation and/or English name, as well as possibly of the place of discovery of the name |- | '''name2 unicode''' to '''name10 unicode''' | optional | Unicode encoding of the hieroglyphs |- | '''Greek''' | optional | The corresponding Greek form |- | '''Greek expanded''' | optional | additional text entries of the left side of the "Greek" line |- | '''Coptic''' | optional | The corresponding Coptic form |- | '''Coptic- Sahidic''' | optional | The corresponding Sahidic form |- | '''Coptic- Bohairic''' | optional | The corresponding Bohairic form |- | '''Coptic-Ancient Coptic ''' | optional | The corresponding Ancient Coptic form |- | '''cuneiform''' | optional | The corresponding cuneiform form |- | '''Remarks''' | optional | For general remarks about the hieroglyphs |- | '''image1''' to '''image5''' | | optional images under the infobox |- | '''image1 width''' to '''image5 width''' | | Entry of the width of the images from '''image1''' to '''image5''', defaults are 200px |- | '''image1 description''' to '''image5 description''' | | Entry of an image description |} == Example == {{infobox hieroglyphs |title = … foo |name = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name2 = < Aa1-G43-I9-G43 > |name2 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name2 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name3 = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name3 in cartouche = yes |name3 cartouche symbol = G43 |name3 determinative = wr-O24 |name3 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name3 explanation = Explanation, Hieroglyphic combinations are divided into sets of a letter and a number in [[unicode]]. hieroglyphs |- | '''name2''' to '''name10''' | optional, but must be entered for all parameters, which begin with name2 to name10 | Other names of the subject in hieroglyphs |- | '''name2 in cartouche''' to '''name10 in cartouche''' | optional | Switches on the display of cartouche for the corresponding other name, the parameters must be entered in a preferred sequence, e. g. „yes" |- | '''name2 cartouche symbol''' to '''name10 cartouche symbol''' | optional | Places the entered hieroglyphs before the cartouche, if not the cartouche will be displayed |- | '''name2 in Serekh''' to '''name10 in Serekh''' | optional | Switches on the display of Serekh for the corresponding other name, the parameters must be entered in a preferred sequence, e.g. „yes" |- | '''name2 Serekh symbol''' to '''name10 Serekh symbol''' | optional | Places the entered hieroglyph symbol before the corresponding name in Serekh, if not the Serekh will be displayed |- | '''name2 determinative''' to '''name10 determinative''' | optional | Places the entered hieroglyphs after the cartouche or the Serekh. |- | '''name2 transcription''' to '''name10 transcription''' | optional | Transcription of the corresponding other hieroglyph names of the subject |- | '''name2 explanation''' to '''name10 explanation''' | optional | Explanation of the corresponding other name of the subject, also translation and/or English name, as well as possibly of the place of discovery of the name |- | '''name2 unicode''' to '''name10 unicode''' | optional | Unicode encoding of the hieroglyphs |- | '''Greek''' | optional | The corresponding Greek form |- | '''Greek expanded''' | optional | additional text entries of the left side of the "Greek" line |- | '''Coptic''' | optional | The corresponding Coptic form |- | '''Coptic- Sahidic''' | optional | The corresponding Sahidic form |- | '''Coptic- Bohairic''' | optional | The corresponding Bohairic form |- | '''Coptic-Ancient Coptic ''' | optional | The corresponding Ancient Coptic form |- | '''cuneiform''' | optional | The corresponding cuneiform form |- | '''Remarks''' | optional | For general remarks about the hieroglyphs |- | '''image1''' to '''image5''' | | optional images under the infobox |- | '''image1 width''' to '''image5 width''' | | Entry of the width of the images from '''image1''' to '''image5''', defaults are 200px |- | '''image1 description''' to '''image5 description''' | | Entry of an image description |} == Example == {{infobox hieroglyphs |title = … foo |name = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name2 = < Aa1-G43-I9-G43 > |name2 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name2 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name3 = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name3 in cartouche = yes |name3 cartouche symbol = G43 |name3 determinative = wr-O24 |name3 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name3 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name4 = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name4 in Serekh = yes |name4 Serekh symbol = G43 |name4 determinative = wr-O24 |name4 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name4 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |remarks = Remarks |image1 = |image2 = |image2 width = 100px |image3 = |image3 description = test }} {{infobox hieroglyphs |title = … mal |name = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name2 = < Aa1-G43-I9-G43 > |name2 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name2 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name3 = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name3 in cartouche = yes |name3 cartouche symbol = G43 |name3 determinative = wr-O24 |name3 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name3 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name4 = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name4 in Serekh = yes |name4 Serekh symbol = G43 |name4 determinative = wr-O24 |name4 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name4 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |remarks = Remarks |image1 = |image2 = |image2 width = 100px |image3 = |image3 description = test }} {{clear}} == Hieroglyphic Combinations == Hieroglyphic combinations are divided into sets of a letter and a number in [[unicode]]. Each hieroglyphic is provided with a letter and number set listed on the [https://www.unicode.org/charts/PDF/U13000.pdf Hieroglyphics Chart]. Example: A001 would be written in the Hieroglyphs Infobox as A1. ==Template data== {{Template data header}} {{cot|title=Parameters (200+)|bg=#ccc}} { "params": { "width": {}, "BREITE": {}, "position": revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Uses TemplateStyles|Template:Infobox hieroglyphs/style.css}} == Usage == To display the infobox in articles, please copy the following source text into the start of the article: {{Infobox hieroglyphs |name = |name transcription = |name explanation = }} == List of parameters == {| class="wikitable" !Variable !width="130" | Type !Explanation |- | '''position''' | optional | Position of the hieroglyph infobox, default is "right" |- | '''width''' | optional | Width of the hieroglyph infobox, default is "300" |- | '''title''' | optional | Name in of the header of the infobox, if not entered the article name + "in [[Egyptian hieroglyphs|hieroglyphs]]" will be displayed. |- | '''expanded title''' | optional | Replaces the text „in [[Egyptian hieroglyphs|hieroglyphs]]" by the entered text. |- | '''name''' | optional, but must be entered for all parameters, which begin with "name" | Name of the subject in hieroglyphs |- | '''name in cartouche''' | optional | Switches on the display of cartouche, the parameters must be entered in a preferred sequence, e.g. "yes" |- | '''name cartouche symbol''' | optional | Places the entered hieroglyphs before the cartouche, if not cartouche will be displayed |- | '''name in Serekh''' | optional | Switches on the display of Serekh, the parameters must be entered in a preferred sequence, e.g. "yes" |- | '''name Serekh symbol''' | optional | Places the entered hieroglyph symbol before the Serekh, if not the Serekh will be displayed |- | '''name determinative''' | optional | Places the entered hieroglyphs after the cartouche or the Serekh. |- | '''name transcription''' | optional | Transcription of the hieroglyph name of the subject |- | '''name explanation''' | optional | Explanation of the name of the subject, also translation and/or English name, as well as possibly the place of discovery of the name |- | '''name unicode''' | optional | Unicode encoding of the hieroglyphs |- | '''name2''' to '''name10''' | optional, but must be entered for all parameters, which begin with name2 to name10 | Other names of the subject in hieroglyphs |- | '''name2 in cartouche''' to '''name10 in cartouche''' | optional | Switches on the display of cartouche for the corresponding other name, the parameters must be entered in a preferred sequence, e. g. „yes" |- | '''name2 cartouche symbol''' to '''name10 cartouche symbol''' | optional | Places the entered hieroglyphs before the cartouche, if not the cartouche will be displayed |- | '''name2 in Serekh''' to '''name10 in Serekh''' | optional | Switches on the display of Serekh for the corresponding other name, the parameters must be entered in a preferred sequence, e.g. „yes" |- | '''name2 Serekh symbol''' to '''name10 Serekh symbol''' | optional | Places the entered hieroglyph symbol before the corresponding name in Serekh, if not the Serekh will be displayed |- | '''name2 determinative''' to '''name10 determinative''' | optional | Places the entered hieroglyphs after the cartouche or the Serekh. |- | '''name2 transcription''' to '''name10 transcription''' | optional | Transcription of the corresponding other hieroglyph names of the subject |- | '''name2 explanation''' to '''name10 explanation''' | optional | Explanation of the corresponding other name of the subject, also translation and/or English name, as well as possibly of the place of discovery of the name |- | '''name2 unicode''' to '''name10 unicode''' | optional | Unicode encoding of the hieroglyphs |- | '''Greek''' | optional | The corresponding Greek form |- | '''Greek expanded''' | optional | additional text entries of the left side of the "Greek" line |- | '''Coptic''' | optional | The corresponding Coptic form |- | '''Coptic- Sahidic''' | optional | The corresponding Sahidic form |- | '''Coptic- Bohairic''' | optional | The corresponding Bohairic form |- | '''Coptic-Ancient Coptic ''' | optional | The corresponding Ancient Coptic form |- | '''cuneiform''' | optional | The corresponding cuneiform form |- | '''Remarks''' | optional | For general remarks about the hieroglyphs |- | '''image1''' to '''image5''' | | optional images under the infobox |- | '''image1 width''' to '''image5 width''' | | Entry of the width of the images from '''image1''' to '''image5''', defaults are 200px |- | '''image1 description''' to '''image5 description''' | | Entry of an image description |} == Example == {{infobox hieroglyphs |title = … foo |name = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name2 = < Aa1-G43-I9-G43 > |name2 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name2 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name3 = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name3 in cartouche = yes |name3 cartouche symbol = G43 |name3 determinative = wr-O24 |name3 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name3 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name4 = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name4 in Serekh = yes |name4 Serekh symbol = G43 |name4 determinative = wr-O24 |name4 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name4 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |remarks = Remarks |image1 = |image2 = |image2 width = 100px |image3 = |image3 description = test }} {{infobox hieroglyphs |title = … mal |name = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name2 = < Aa1-G43-I9-G43 > |name2 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name2 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name3 = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name3 in cartouche = yes |name3 cartouche symbol = G43 |name3 determinative = wr-O24 |name3 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name3 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name4 = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name4 in Serekh = yes |name4 Serekh symbol = G43 |name4 determinative = wr-O24 |name4 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name4 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |remarks = Remarks |image1 = |image2 = |image2 width = 100px |image3 = |image3 description = test }} {{clear}} == Hieroglyphic Combinations == Hieroglyphic combinations are divided into sets of a letter and a number in [[unicode]]. Each hieroglyphic is provided with a letter and number set listed on the [https://www.unicode.org/charts/PDF/U13000.pdf Hieroglyphics Chart]. Example: A001 would be written in the Hieroglyphs Infobox as A1. ==Template data== {{Template data header}} {{cot|title=Parameters (200+)|bg=#ccc}} { "params": { "width": {}, "BREITE": {}, "position": |- | '''Coptic- Sahidic''' | optional | The corresponding Sahidic form |- | '''Coptic- Bohairic''' | optional | The corresponding Bohairic form |- | '''Coptic-Ancient Coptic ''' | optional | The corresponding Ancient Coptic form |- | '''cuneiform''' | optional | The corresponding cuneiform form |- | '''Remarks''' | optional | For general remarks about the hieroglyphs |- | '''image1''' to '''image5''' | | optional images under the infobox |- | '''image1 width''' to '''image5 width''' | | Entry of the width of the images from '''image1''' to '''image5''', defaults are 200px |- | '''image1 description''' to '''image5 description''' | | Entry of an image description |} == Example == {{infobox hieroglyphs |title = … foo |name = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name2 = < Aa1-G43-I9-G43 > |name2 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name2 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name3 = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name3 in cartouche = yes |name3 cartouche symbol = G43 |name3 determinative = wr-O24 |name3 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name3 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name4 = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name4 in Serekh = yes |name4 Serekh symbol = G43 |name4 determinative = wr-O24 |name4 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name4 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |remarks = Remarks |image1 = |image2 = |image2 width = 100px |image3 = |image3 description = test }} {{infobox hieroglyphs |title = … mal |name = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name2 = < Aa1-G43-I9-G43 > |name2 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name2 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name3 = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name3 in cartouche = yes |name3 cartouche symbol = G43 |name3 determinative = wr-O24 |name3 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name3 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name4 = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name4 in Serekh = yes |name4 Serekh symbol = G43 |name4 determinative = wr-O24 |name4 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name4 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |remarks = Remarks |image1 = |image2 = |image2 width = 100px |image3 = |image3 description = test }} {{clear}} == Hieroglyphic Combinations == Hieroglyphic combinations are divided into sets of a letter and a number in [[unicode]]. Each hieroglyphic is provided with a letter and number set listed on the [https://www.unicode.org/charts/PDF/U13000.pdf Hieroglyphics Chart]. Example: A001 would be written in the Hieroglyphs Infobox as A1. ==Template data== {{Template data header}} {{cot|title=Parameters (200+)|bg=#ccc}} { "params": { "width": {}, "BREITE": {}, "position": {}, "AUSRICHTUNG": {}, "title": {}, "TITEL": {}, "expanded title": {}, "TITEL-ERWEITERT": {}, "name": {}, "name in cartouche": {}, "NAME-IN-KARTUSCHE": {}, "name cartouche symbol": {}, revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Uses TemplateStyles|Template:Infobox hieroglyphs/style.css}} == Usage == To display the infobox in articles, please copy the following source text into the start of the article: {{Infobox hieroglyphs |name = |name transcription = |name explanation = }} == List of parameters == {| class="wikitable" !Variable !width="130" | Type !Explanation |- | '''position''' | optional | Position of the hieroglyph infobox, default is "right" |- | '''width''' | optional | Width of the hieroglyph infobox, default is "300" |- | '''title''' | optional | Name in of the header of the infobox, if not entered the article name + "in [[:en:Egyptian hieroglyphs|hieroglyphs]]" will be displayed. |- | '''expanded title''' | optional | Replaces the text „in [[:en:Egyptian hieroglyphs|hieroglyphs]]" by the entered text. |- | '''name''' | optional, but must be entered for all parameters, which begin with "name" | Name of the subject in hieroglyphs |- | '''name in cartouche''' | optional | Switches on the display of cartouche, the parameters must be entered in a preferred sequence, e.g. "yes" |- | '''name cartouche symbol''' | optional | Places the entered hieroglyphs before the cartouche, if not cartouche will be displayed |- | '''name in Serekh''' | optional | Switches on the display of Serekh, the parameters must be entered in a preferred sequence, e.g. "yes" |- | '''name Serekh symbol''' | optional | Places the entered hieroglyph symbol before the Serekh, if not the Serekh will be displayed |- | '''name determinative''' | optional | Places the entered hieroglyphs after the cartouche or the Serekh. |- | '''name transcription''' | optional | Transcription of the hieroglyph name of the subject |- | '''name explanation''' | optional | Explanation of the name of the subject, also translation and/or English name, as well as possibly the place of discovery of the name |- | '''name unicode''' | optional | Unicode encoding of the hieroglyphs |- | '''name2''' to '''name10''' | optional, but must be entered for all parameters, which begin with name2 to name10 | Other names of the subject in hieroglyphs |- | '''name2 in cartouche''' to '''name10 in cartouche''' | optional | Switches on the display of cartouche for the corresponding other name, the parameters must be entered in a preferred sequence, e. g. „yes" |- | '''name2 cartouche symbol''' to '''name10 cartouche symbol''' | optional | Places the entered hieroglyphs before the cartouche, if not the cartouche will be displayed |- | '''name2 in Serekh''' to '''name10 in Serekh''' | optional | Switches on the display of Serekh for the corresponding other name, the parameters must be entered in a preferred sequence, e.g. „yes" |- | '''name2 Serekh symbol''' to '''name10 Serekh symbol''' | optional | Places the entered hieroglyph symbol before the corresponding name in Serekh, if not the Serekh will be displayed |- | '''name2 determinative''' to '''name10 determinative''' | optional | Places the entered hieroglyphs after the cartouche or the Serekh. |- | '''name2 transcription''' to '''name10 transcription''' | optional | Transcription of the corresponding other hieroglyph names of the subject |- | '''name2 explanation''' to '''name10 explanation''' | optional | Explanation of the corresponding other name of the subject, also translation and/or English name, as well as possibly of the place of discovery of the name |- | '''name2 unicode''' to '''name10 unicode''' | optional | Unicode encoding of the hieroglyphs |- | '''Greek''' | optional | The corresponding Greek form |- | '''Greek expanded''' | optional | additional text entries of the left side of the "Greek" line |- | '''Coptic''' | optional | The corresponding Coptic form |- | '''Coptic- Sahidic''' | optional | The corresponding Sahidic form |- | '''Coptic- Bohairic''' | optional | The corresponding Bohairic form |- | '''Coptic-Ancient Coptic ''' | optional | The corresponding Ancient Coptic form |- | '''cuneiform''' | optional | The corresponding cuneiform form |- | '''Remarks''' | optional | For general remarks about the hieroglyphs |- | '''image1''' to '''image5''' | | optional images under the infobox |- | '''image1 width''' to '''image5 width''' | | Entry of the width of the images from '''image1''' to '''image5''', defaults are 200px |- | '''image1 description''' to '''image5 description''' | | Entry of an image description |} == Example == {{infobox hieroglyphs |title = … foo |name = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name2 = < Aa1-G43-I9-G43 > |name2 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name2 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name3 = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name3 in cartouche = yes |name3 cartouche symbol = G43 |name3 determinative = wr-O24 |name3 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name3 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name4 = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name4 in Serekh = yes |name4 Serekh symbol = G43 |name4 determinative = wr-O24 |name4 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name4 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |remarks = Remarks |image1 = |image2 = |image2 width = 100px |image3 = |image3 description = test }} {{infobox hieroglyphs |title = … mal |name = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name2 = < Aa1-G43-I9-G43 > |name2 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name2 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name3 = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name3 in cartouche = yes |name3 cartouche symbol = G43 |name3 determinative = wr-O24 |name3 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name3 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name4 = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name4 in Serekh = yes |name4 Serekh symbol = G43 |name4 determinative = wr-O24 |name4 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name4 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |remarks = Remarks |image1 = |image2 = |image2 width = 100px |image3 = |image3 description = test }} {{clear}} == Hieroglyphic Combinations == Hieroglyphic combinations are divided into sets of a letter and a number in [[:en:Unicode|Unicode]]. Each hieroglyphic is provided with a letter and number set listed on the [https://www.unicode.org/charts/PDF/U13000.pdf Hieroglyphics Chart]. Example: A001 would be written in the Hieroglyphs Infobox as A1. ==Template data== {{Template data header}} {{cot|title=Parameters (200+)|bg=#ccc}} { "params": { "width": {}, "BREITE": {}, "position": {}, "AUSRICHTUNG": {}, "title": {}, "TITEL": {}, "expanded title": {}, "TITEL-ERWEITERT": {}, "name": {}, "name in cartouche": {}, "NAME-IN-KARTUSCHE": {}, "name cartouche symbol": {}, "NAME-KARTUSCHE-SYMBOL": {}, "name determinative": {}, "NAME-DETERMINATIV": {}, "name transcription": {}, "NAME-TRANSKRIPTION": {}, "name explanation": {}, "NAME-ERKLÄRUNG": {}, "name in Serekh": {}, "NAME-IN-SERECH": {}, "name Serekh symbol": {}, "NAME-SERECH-SYMBOL": {}, "name unicode": {}, "name2": {}, "name2 in cartouche": {}, "NAME2-IN-KARTUSCHE": {}, "name2 cartouche symbol": {}, Serekh": {}, "NAME4-IN-SERECH": {}, "name4 Serekh symbol": {}, "name4 unicode": {}, "name5": {}, "name5 in cartouche": {}, "NAME5-IN-KARTUSCHE": {}, "name5 cartouche symbol": {}, "NAME6-KARTUSCHE-SYMBOL": {}, "name6 determinative": {}, "NAME6-DETERMINATIV": {}, "name6 transcription": {}, "NAME6-TRANSKRIPTION": {}, "name6 explanation": {}, "NAME6-ERKLÄRUNG": {}, "name6 in Serekh": {}, "NAME6-IN-SERECH": {}, "name6 Serekh symbol": {}, "name6 unicode": {}, "name7": {}, "name7 in cartouche": {}, "NAME7-IN-KARTUSCHE": {}, "name7 cartouche symbol": {}, Explanation, ''translation'' |name3 = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name3 in cartouche = yes |name3 cartouche symbol = G43 |name3 determinative = wr-O24 |name3 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name3 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name4 = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name4 in Serekh = yes |name4 Serekh symbol = G43 |name4 determinative = wr-O24 |name4 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name4 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |remarks = Remarks |image1 = |image2 = |image2 width = 100px |image3 = |image3 description = test }} {{clear}} == Hieroglyphic Combinations == Hieroglyphic combinations are divided into sets of a letter and a number in [[:en:Unicode|Unicode]]. Each hieroglyphic is provided with a letter and number set listed on the [https://www.unicode.org/charts/PDF/U13000.pdf Hieroglyphics Chart]. Example: A001 would be written in the Hieroglyphs Infobox as A1. ==Template data== {{Template data header}} {{cot|title=Parameters (200+)|bg=#ccc}} { "params": { "width": {}, "BREITE": {}, "position": revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Uses TemplateStyles|Template:Infobox hieroglyphs/style.css}} == Usage == To display the infobox in articles, please copy the following source text into the start of the article: {{Infobox hieroglyphs |name = |name transcription = |name explanation = }} == List of parameters == {| class="wikitable" !Variable !width="130" | Type !Explanation |- | '''position''' | optional | Position of the hieroglyph infobox, default is "right" |- | '''width''' | optional | Width of the hieroglyph infobox, default is "300" |- | '''title''' | optional | Name in of the header of the infobox, if not entered the article name + "in [[:en:Egyptian hieroglyphs|hieroglyphs]]" will be displayed. |- | '''expanded title''' | optional | Replaces the text „in [[:en:Egyptian hieroglyphs|hieroglyphs]]" by the entered text. |- | '''name''' | optional, but must be entered for all parameters, which begin with "name" | Name of the subject in hieroglyphs |- | '''name in cartouche''' | optional | Switches on the display of cartouche, the parameters must be entered in a preferred sequence, e.g. "yes" |- | '''name cartouche symbol''' | optional | Places the entered hieroglyphs before the cartouche, if not cartouche will be displayed |- | '''name in Serekh''' | optional | Switches on the display of Serekh, the parameters must be entered in a preferred sequence, e.g. "yes" |- | '''name Serekh symbol''' | optional | Places the entered hieroglyph symbol before the Serekh, if not the Serekh will be displayed |- | '''name determinative''' | optional | Places the entered hieroglyphs after the cartouche or the Serekh. |- | '''name transcription''' | optional | Transcription of the hieroglyph name of the subject |- | '''name explanation''' | optional | Explanation of the name of the subject, also translation and/or English name, as well as possibly the place of discovery of the name |- | '''name unicode''' | optional | Unicode encoding of the hieroglyphs |- | '''name2''' to '''name10''' | optional, but must be entered for all parameters, which begin with name2 to name10 | Other names of the subject in hieroglyphs |- | '''name2 in cartouche''' to '''name10 in cartouche''' | optional | Switches on the display of cartouche for the corresponding other name, the parameters must be entered in a preferred sequence, e. g. „yes" |- | '''name2 cartouche symbol''' to '''name10 cartouche symbol''' | optional | Places the entered hieroglyphs before the cartouche, if not the cartouche will be displayed |- | '''name2 in Serekh''' to '''name10 in Serekh''' | optional | Switches on the display of Serekh for the corresponding other name, the parameters must be entered in a preferred sequence, e.g. „yes" |- | '''name2 Serekh symbol''' to '''name10 Serekh symbol''' | optional | Places the entered hieroglyph symbol before the corresponding name in Serekh, if not the Serekh will be displayed |- | '''name2 determinative''' to '''name10 determinative''' | optional | Places the entered hieroglyphs after the cartouche or the Serekh. |- | '''name2 transcription''' to '''name10 transcription''' | optional | Transcription of the corresponding other hieroglyph names of the subject |- | '''name2 explanation''' to '''name10 explanation''' | optional | Explanation of the corresponding other name of the subject, also translation and/or English name, as well as possibly of the place of discovery of the name |- | '''name2 unicode''' to '''name10 unicode''' | optional | Unicode encoding of the hieroglyphs |- | '''Greek''' | optional | The corresponding Greek form |- | '''Greek expanded''' | optional | additional text entries of the left side of the "Greek" line |- | '''Coptic''' | optional | The corresponding Coptic form |- | '''Coptic- Sahidic''' | optional | The corresponding Sahidic form |- | '''Coptic- Bohairic''' | optional | The corresponding Bohairic form |- | '''Coptic-Ancient Coptic ''' | optional | The corresponding Ancient Coptic form |- | '''cuneiform''' | optional | The corresponding cuneiform form |- | '''Remarks''' | optional | For general remarks about the hieroglyphs |- | '''image1''' to '''image5''' | | optional images under the infobox |- | '''image1 width''' to '''image5 width''' | | Entry of the width of the images from '''image1''' to '''image5''', defaults are 200px |- | '''image1 description''' to '''image5 description''' | | Entry of an image description |} == Example == {{infobox hieroglyphs |title = … foo |name = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name2 = < Aa1-G43-I9-G43 > |name2 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name2 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name3 = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name3 in cartouche = yes |name3 cartouche symbol = G43 |name3 determinative = wr-O24 |name3 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name3 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name4 = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name4 in Serekh = yes |name4 Serekh symbol = G43 |name4 determinative = wr-O24 |name4 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name4 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |remarks = Remarks |image1 = |image2 = |image2 width = 100px |image3 = |image3 description = test }} {{infobox hieroglyphs |title = … mal |name = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name2 = < Aa1-G43-I9-G43 > |name2 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name2 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name3 = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name3 in cartouche = yes |name3 cartouche symbol = G43 |name3 determinative = wr-O24 |name3 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name3 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name4 = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name4 in Serekh = yes |name4 Serekh symbol = G43 |name4 determinative = wr-O24 |name4 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name4 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |remarks = Remarks |image1 = |image2 = |image2 width = 100px |image3 = |image3 description = test }} {{clear}} == Hieroglyphic Combinations == Hieroglyphic combinations are divided into sets of a letter and a number in [[:en:Unicode|Unicode]]. Each hieroglyphic is provided with a letter and number set listed on the [https://www.unicode.org/charts/PDF/U13000.pdf Hieroglyphics Chart]. Example: A001 would be written in the Hieroglyphs Infobox as A1. ==Template data== {{Template data header}} {{cot|title=Parameters (200+)|bg=#ccc}} { "params": { "width": {}, "BREITE": {}, "position": {}, "AUSRICHTUNG": {}, "title": {}, "TITEL": {}, "expanded title": {}, "TITEL-ERWEITERT": {}, "name": {}, "name in cartouche": {}, "NAME-IN-KARTUSCHE": {}, "name cartouche symbol": {}, "NAME-KARTUSCHE-SYMBOL": {}, "name determinative": {}, "NAME-DETERMINATIV": {}, "name transcription": {}, "NAME-TRANSKRIPTION": {}, "name explanation": {}, "NAME-ERKLÄRUNG": {}, "name in Serekh": {}, "NAME-IN-SERECH": {}, "name Serekh symbol": {}, "NAME-SERECH-SYMBOL": {}, "name unicode": {}, "name2": {}, "name2 in cartouche": {}, "NAME2-IN-KARTUSCHE": {}, "name2 cartouche symbol": {}, revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Uses TemplateStyles|Template:Infobox hieroglyphs/style.css}} == Usage == To display the infobox in articles, please copy the following source text into the start of the article: {{Infobox hieroglyphs |name = |name transcription = |name explanation = }} == List of parameters == {| class="wikitable" !Variable !width="130" | Type !Explanation |- | '''position''' | optional | Position of the hieroglyph infobox, default is "right" |- | '''width''' | optional | Width of the hieroglyph infobox, default is "300" |- | '''title''' | optional | Name in of the header of the infobox, if not entered the article name + "in [[:en:Egyptian hieroglyphs|hieroglyphs]]" will be displayed. |- | '''expanded title''' | optional | Replaces the text „in [[:en:Egyptian hieroglyphs|hieroglyphs]]" by the entered text. |- | '''name''' | optional, but must be entered for all parameters, which begin with "name" | Name of the subject in hieroglyphs |- | '''name in cartouche''' | optional | Switches on the display of cartouche, the parameters must be entered in a preferred sequence, e.g. "yes" |- | '''name cartouche symbol''' | optional | Places the entered hieroglyphs before the cartouche, if not cartouche will be displayed |- | '''name in Serekh''' | optional | Switches on the display of Serekh, the parameters must be entered in a preferred sequence, e.g. "yes" |- | '''name Serekh symbol''' | optional | Places the entered hieroglyph symbol before the Serekh, if not the Serekh will be displayed |- | '''name determinative''' | optional | Places the entered hieroglyphs after the cartouche or the Serekh. |- | '''name transcription''' | optional | Transcription of the hieroglyph name of the subject |- | '''name explanation''' | optional | Explanation of the name of the subject, also translation and/or English name, as well as possibly the place of discovery of the name |- | '''name unicode''' | optional | Unicode encoding of the hieroglyphs |- | '''name2''' to '''name10''' | optional, but must be entered for all parameters, which begin with name2 to name10 | Other names of the subject in hieroglyphs |- | '''name2 in cartouche''' to '''name10 in cartouche''' | optional | Switches on the display of cartouche for the corresponding other name, the parameters must be entered in a preferred sequence, e. g. „yes" |- | '''name2 cartouche symbol''' to '''name10 cartouche symbol''' | optional | Places the entered hieroglyphs before the cartouche, if not the cartouche will be displayed |- | '''name2 in Serekh''' to '''name10 in Serekh''' | optional | Switches on the display of Serekh for the corresponding other name, the parameters must be entered in a preferred sequence, e.g. „yes" |- | '''name2 Serekh symbol''' to '''name10 Serekh symbol''' | optional | Places the entered hieroglyph symbol before the corresponding name in Serekh, if not the Serekh will be displayed |- | '''name2 determinative''' to '''name10 determinative''' | optional | Places the entered hieroglyphs after the cartouche or the Serekh. |- | '''name2 transcription''' to '''name10 transcription''' | optional | Transcription of the corresponding other hieroglyph names of the subject |- | '''name2 explanation''' to '''name10 explanation''' | optional | Explanation of the corresponding other name of the subject, also translation and/or English name, as well as possibly of the place of discovery of the name |- | '''name2 unicode''' to '''name10 unicode''' | optional | Unicode encoding of the hieroglyphs |- | '''Greek''' | optional | The corresponding Greek form |- | '''Greek expanded''' | optional | additional text entries of the left side of the "Greek" line |- | '''Coptic''' | optional | The corresponding Coptic form |- | '''Coptic- Sahidic''' | optional | The corresponding Sahidic form |- | '''Coptic- Bohairic''' | optional | The corresponding Bohairic form |- | '''Coptic-Ancient Coptic ''' | optional | The corresponding Ancient Coptic form |- | '''cuneiform''' | optional | The corresponding cuneiform form |- | '''Remarks''' | optional | For general remarks about the hieroglyphs |- | '''image1''' to '''image5''' | | optional images under the infobox |- | '''image1 width''' to '''image5 width''' | | Entry of the width of the images from '''image1''' to '''image5''', defaults are 200px |- | '''image1 description''' to '''image5 description''' | | Entry of an image description |} == Example == {{infobox hieroglyphs |title = … foo |name = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name2 = < Aa1-G43-I9-G43 > |name2 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name2 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name3 = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name3 in cartouche = yes |name3 cartouche symbol = G43 |name3 determinative = wr-O24 |name3 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name3 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name4 = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name4 in Serekh = yes |name4 Serekh symbol = G43 |name4 determinative = wr-O24 |name4 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name4 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |remarks = Remarks |image1 = |image2 = |image2 width = 100px |image3 = |image3 description = test }} {{infobox hieroglyphs |title = … mal |name = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name2 = < Aa1-G43-I9-G43 > |name2 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name2 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name3 = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name3 in cartouche = yes |name3 cartouche symbol = G43 |name3 determinative = wr-O24 |name3 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name3 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |name4 = Aa1-G43-I9-G43 |name4 in Serekh = yes |name4 Serekh symbol = G43 |name4 determinative = wr-O24 |name4 transcription = Transcription ''(cursive)'' |name4 explanation = Explanation, ''translation'' |remarks = Remarks |image1 = |image2 = |image2 width = 100px |image3 = |image3 description = test }} {{clear}} == Hieroglyphic Combinations == Hieroglyphic combinations are divided into sets of a letter and a number in [[:en:Unicode|Unicode]]. Each hieroglyphic is provided with a letter and number set listed on the [https://www.unicode.org/charts/PDF/U13000.pdf Hieroglyphics Chart]. Example: A001 would be written in the Hieroglyphs Infobox as A1. ==Template data== {{Template data header}} {{cot|title=Parameters (200+)|bg=#ccc}} { "params": { "width": {}, "BREITE": {}, "position": {}, "AUSRICHTUNG": {}, "title": {}, "TITEL": {}, "expanded title": {}, "TITEL-ERWEITERT": {}, "name": {}, "name in cartouche": {}, "NAME-IN-KARTUSCHE": {}, "name cartouche symbol": {}, "NAME-KARTUSCHE-SYMBOL": {}, "name determinative": {}, "NAME-DETERMINATIV": {}, "name transcription": {}, "NAME-TRANSKRIPTION": {}, "name explanation": {}, "NAME-ERKLÄRUNG": {}, "name in Serekh": {}, "NAME-IN-SERECH": {}, "name Serekh symbol": {}, "NAME-SERECH-SYMBOL": {}, "name unicode": {}, "name2": {}, "name2 in cartouche": {}, "NAME2-IN-KARTUSCHE": {}, "name2 cartouche symbol": {}, "NAME2-KARTUSCHE-SYMBOL": {}, "name2 determinative": {}, "NAME2-DETERMINATIV": {}, "name2 transcription": {}, "NAME2-TRANSKRIPTION": {}, "name2 explanation": {}, "NAME2-ERKLÄRUNG": {}, "name2 in
